notes: Canonical 33 node; MAJOR MEETING POINT where Belinus and Elen currents converge. Prominent hilltop and Iron Age hillfort with extensive views over the Berkshire Downs. Entry point for both currents in the Highclere area. Named site from the canonical 33 list.

Canonical 33 node; MAJOR MEETING POINT where Belinus and Elen currents converge. Iron Age hillfort and White Horse Hill complex; one of the most prominent sites on the Ridgeway. Named in the canonical 33 list. Entry point for both currents in the Uffington area.
Canonical 33 node; MEETING POINT where Belinus and Elen currents converge. Natural hillock below Uffington Castle with legendary associations. Included in the canonical 33 list.
